project.name: ACP
project.purpose: A reusable AI Collaboration Protocol that separates semantic reasoning from implementation while keeping repository metadata synchronized.

sourceOfTruth.externalReferenceModel: ACP repository owns co-ai. Project repositories own co-project and reference ACP externally by default.
sourceOfTruth.conversationDependency: Previous conversations are not required to continue work.

architecture.normalProjectDefault: Normal projects keep co-project and reference ACP externally instead of copying co-ai.

agentRoles.semanticAgent: Owns semantic analysis, reasoning, dependency analysis, concept design, and Knowledge Model structure.
agentRoles.implementationAgent: Owns repository updates, validation, Metadata maintenance, serialization, and code generation.

currentMilestone: ACP 1.0.1 clarified the external-reference model: ACP owns co-ai, projects own co-project.
knownRisks: No automated Markdown link checker is configured.
Projects that already copied co-ai may need to decide whether to remove the local copy or treat it as an intentional pinned protocol version.
nextExpectedTask: Maintain ACP metadata whenever the reusable protocol, external-reference guidance, repository structure, examples, or release status changes.
